title: scutellaria orientalis subsp. pectinata
intro: Scutellaria orientalis subsp. pectinata, also known as Chinese skullcap, is a plant species within the mint family that is widely distributed in East Asia. The medicinal properties of Scutellaria orientalis subsp. pectinata include its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its flavonoids and phenolic acids. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its numerous health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and protecting against cardiovascular disease. In herbal preparations, Scutellaria orientalis subsp. pectinata is often used in teas, capsules, and infusions to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
